name: Santiago Mora
title: AI Engineer | Data Scientist
homeIntro: I've shipped practical AI systems for education, hiring, and enterprise. Now I'm researching how to make LLMs better: optimizing architectures, designing efficient knowledge representations, and improving cost-performance.
highlights: Architected multi-model chatbot systems deployed to 3,300+ users.
Built RAG pipelines for candidate-job matching used by 3,000+ users.
1st place winner at Guadalahacks 2025 for POI validation with deep learning.
